hooks.command: cat ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/hooks/launcher-context.md 2>/dev/null || echo '## Project Launcher Active\nUse /launch-project, /write-prd, /grill-prd, or /scaffold-gsd.'

echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | python3 -c "
import sys, json, os
try:
    data = json.load(sys.stdin)
    path = data.get('file_path', data.get('filePath', ''))
    content = data.get('content', data.get('new_string', '')).lower()
    launcher_patterns = ['prd', 'requirements', 'research', 'context', 'gap-analysis', 'interview', 'discovery', 'roadmap', 'project.md', 'requirements.md']
    is_launcher_artifact = any(p in path.lower() for p in launcher_patterns) or any(p in content[:200] for p in ['## prd', '## requirements', '## research', '# product requirements', '## project overview'])
    vault_path = os.path.expanduser('~/Library/Mobile Documents/iCloud~md~obsidian/Documents/Obsidian Vault')
    has_vault = os.path.isdir(vault_path)
    if is_launcher_artifact and has_vault:
        print('Launcher artifact detected and Obsidian vault found. Also save this to the vault using second-brain methodology: [[wikilinks]] to related projects, #tags in frontmatter, and place under the appropriate Projects/ folder with MOC links.')
    else:
        print('')
except:
    print('')
" 2>/dev/null || echo ''
